text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and I are in the middle of training
when she has a small outburst.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dammit! How am I already out of breath?!
choice_data_list: Maybe you're still tired from your last race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally fine, and I'm gonna run in the next race
too, so—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: I really think you should rest...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm fine! Let's get back to training.

All those back-to-back races have clearly
exhausted her. I should rethink her upcoming
schedule.
